title: Plant Science is Reorganizing Around Climate-Relevant Crops: Evidence from 4.9 Million Publications
description: Code, manuscript, and derived data for a bibliometric analysis of ~4.9 million plant-science publications (1900-2024), showing a structural reorganization of the field away from model-organism-centred discovery toward crop-centred, climate-relevant research. Large derived datasets (the knowledge-graph database and processed corpus) are archived in a companion Zenodo data record; see DATA.md.
